The permissions matrix for 'data_analyst' shows 'Create' checked for the 'database.cluster' resource, or a successful SQL GRANT command execution.
The Security/Users tab shows a user named 'maria_garcia' with status 'ACTIVE', or a successful SQL CREATE USER command execution including the password.
The user details for 'maria_garcia' show the assigned role as 'data_analyst', or the SQL CREATE USER/GRANT command explicitly links the user to the 'data_analyst' role.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine database client or OrientDB Studio
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual OrientDB Studio web interface or a terminal running a database client, not a text editor or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify that commands were actually executed
integrity.visual_evidence: If SQL was used, look for success messages (e.g., 'Command executed successfully', '1 record(s) updated') rather than just typed text sitting unexecuted in a query box.

integrity.description: Verify the UI hasn't been superficially altered
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements, fonts, and layouts look consistent with OrientDB Studio, without signs of browser DevTools manipulation or pasted text overlays.
